steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and Ocupante. The correct choice must draw a direct parallel between the two works.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'size differences': focuses on how the sculptures differ in scale, not on what they share. ✗
  • Choice B — 'both are LED light sculptures by Grimanesa Amoros': uses parallel structure ("as is Ocupante") to underscore that both works share the same medium and artist. ✓
  • Choice C — 'contrasts the pieces': explicitly sets the two works against each other, the opposite of emphasizing similarity. ✗
  • Choice D — 'mentions only one sculpture': says nothing about Ocupante, so no comparison is made. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
